02 · About Me

Turning data
into decisions

I am a Data Analyst based in Hyderabad with hands-on industry experience at Asian Technology Hub, where I built end-to-end analytics solutions that directly impacted business outcomes — reducing reporting time by 40% and improving data accuracy by 25% through ETL validation.

I specialise in EDA, statistical analysis, feature engineering, RFM segmentation, and A/B testing — translating complex datasets into clear, actionable insights for cross-functional stakeholders and executive leadership.

Certified in Python and SQL by HackerRank, and Data Analytics by Cisco & HP Foundation. Completing B.Tech in Information Technology from JNTUK (2021–2025). Familiar with Machine Learning fundamentals using Scikit-learn.

03 · Experience

Where I've worked

Data Analyst Intern
Asian Technology Hub  ·  Hyderabad, India
Jul 2025 – Mar 2026

  • Performed exploratory data analysis on large structured datasets using Python (Pandas, NumPy) and SQL, uncovering actionable patterns that supported data-driven decision-making across multiple business units.

  • Designed and deployed interactive Power BI dashboards with DAX measures and KPI tracking for real-time business performance monitoring — reduced manual reporting time by 40% and significantly improved stakeholder visibility into key metrics.

  • Executed end-to-end ETL validation and data quality checks across production pipelines — improved reporting accuracy by 25% and minimised downstream data errors, ensuring reliable analytics outputs.

  • Optimised complex SQL queries leveraging CTEs, subqueries, joins, and window functions; automated repetitive Python workflows — cut manual effort by 30% and improved overall operational efficiency.

  • Translated complex analytical findings into clear visual business recommendations for cross-functional stakeholders, enabling faster, more confident decision-making at the leadership level.
